jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Biocon
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
